capabilities.description: Resolves aiostreams:// virtual paths into short-lived streaming URLs.

presentation.summary: Zero-storage virtual playback backed by dynamic AIOStreams resolution.
presentation.description_markdown: Resolves database-backed `aiostreams://` virtual media references into short-lived streaming URLs without storing media files in Silo.
presentation.setup_markdown: Install the plugin from the custom catalog. This release uses a mock resolver and is intended for integration development; replace the mock before production playback.
